name: ppt-order-autopilot
description: Agent-native PPT order intake, production, QA, delivery, and recovery workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run PPT orders from intake through delivery gates
interface.longDescription: A progressive-disclosure Codex plugin for WeCom or attachment intake, owner approval gates, one-slide-per-subagent image production, deterministic locked chrome, QA, recovery, and delivery.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run or resume PPT Order Autopilot from durable state. Reconcile side effects first, load only the current stage skill, and continue until an owner gate, hard blocker, or closeout.
